popularStory.description:
Gruffydd ap Rhys

For Rhys ap Gruffydd, known as The Lord Rhys (1132–1197), see Rhys ap Gruffydd.
This is a Welsh name. It means Gruffydd son of Rhys.

This article needs additional citations for veri …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales於1123年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth42歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd23歲。他於1148年之前與Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年4月28日在威爾士布洛可爾享年74歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales于1123年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth42岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd23岁。他于1148年之前与Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年4月28日在威尔士布洛可爾享年74岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales was born in 1123, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, was 42 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, was 23. He married Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis before 1148. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 April 1197, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 74, and was buried in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales est né en 1123, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis avant 1148. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1197, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.Dynevor Castle, Llandeilo, Carmarthshire: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 1123 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth 42 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd 23. Er hat vor 1148 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. April 1197 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales è nato il nel 1123 nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis prima del 1148. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1197, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesが1123年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarthは42歳，母Gwenllian ferch Gruffyddは23歳であった。1148年以前にGwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年4月28日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで74歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(이)가 1123년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1148년 이전 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 4월 28일 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales nasceu em 1123, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis antes 1148. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales родился в 1123 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis перед 1148 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 апреля 1197 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс.
